    11	Abstract
    12	Thedominantsequencetransductionmodelsarebasedoncomplexrecurrentor
    13	convolutionalneuralnetworksthatincludeanencoderandadecoder. Thebest
    14	performing models also connect the encoder and decoder through an attention
    15	mechanism. We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer,
    16	basedsolelyonattentionmechanisms,dispensingwithrecurrenceandconvolutions
    17	entirely. Experiments on two machine translation tasks show these models to
    18	besuperiorinqualitywhilebeingmoreparallelizableandrequiringsignificantly
    19	less time to train. Our model achieves 28.4 BLEU on the WMT 2014 English-
    20	to-German translation task, improving over the existing best results, including
    21	ensembles,byover2BLEU.OntheWMT2014English-to-Frenchtranslationtask,
    22	ourmodelestablishesanewsingle-modelstate-of-the-artBLEUscoreof41.8after

   473	7 Conclusion
   474	Inthiswork,wepresentedtheTransformer,thefirstsequencetransductionmodelbasedentirelyon
   475	attention,replacingtherecurrentlayersmostcommonlyusedinencoder-decoderarchitectureswith
   476	multi-headedself-attention.
   477	For translation tasks, the Transformer can be trained significantly faster than architectures based
   478	on recurrent or convolutional layers. On both WMT 2014 English-to-German and WMT 2014
   479	English-to-Frenchtranslationtasks,weachieveanewstateoftheart. Intheformertaskourbest
   480	modeloutperformsevenallpreviouslyreportedensembles.
   481	Weareexcitedaboutthefutureofattention-basedmodelsandplantoapplythemtoothertasks. We
   482	plantoextendtheTransformertoproblemsinvolvinginputandoutputmodalitiesotherthantextand
   483	toinvestigatelocal,restrictedattentionmechanismstoefficientlyhandlelargeinputsandoutputs
   484	suchasimages,audioandvideo. Makinggenerationlesssequentialisanotherresearchgoalsofours.
   485	The code we used to train and evaluate our models is available at https://github.com/
   486	tensorflow/tensor2tensor.
